title: Announcing Lingmo OS 1.0 — A New Dawn for Linux
author: Lingmo Team
excerpt: After years of development, we are thrilled to announce the first stable release of Lingmo OS. Built with passion and precision, Lingmo OS 1.0 marks a new chapter in open-source desktop computing.

title: Lingmo Desktop: A Deep Dive into Our Custom Desktop Environment
author: Lingmo Team
excerpt: Explore the architecture and design philosophy behind the Lingmo Desktop Environment. From the compositor to the application menu, every detail is crafted for productivity.

title: Security First: How Lingmo OS Protects Your Data
author: Lingmo Team
excerpt: Learn about the security features built into Lingmo OS, including full disk encryption, sandboxed applications, and our responsible disclosure policy.

title: Our Journey to Wayland: Why We Chose the Future of Display Servers
author: Lingmo Team
excerpt: Why Lingmo OS uses Wayland as the default display server and how it benefits users with smoother graphics, better security, and modern features.
